Adding these values together:

- Rye revenue: $120

The total revenue from selling these loaves of bread is <<200>> <<plus>> <<120>> <<plus>> <<150>>. This equals $470, which represents the daily income generated from bread sales. The student can use this data to explore various business strategies and financial planning techniques.
